abstract.text: Protocol implemented by the built-in classes in Godot to allow to be wrapped in a
Framework to write Godot Game Extensions using the Swift Programming Language.
Initializes a new instance of the type PhysicsServer3DExtension, call this constructor
when you create a subclass of this type.
Creates a PhysicsServer3DExtension that wraps the Godot native object pointed to by the nativeHandle
